notes: SHIP v1.14.297 - cheap-fix polish from the running-list drop (owner 'yes ship'). Two safe changes: (1) NAV BACKDROP fully opaque - #rd-botnav background gradient alpha 0.96/0.99 -> 1/1 (L9196), so scrolled content can no longer bleed through the bottom nav's top edge (external-review rider, FIX-2 neighborhood; kept the color gradient for depth, just removed the residual translucency; over the OLED-black bg the only perceptible change is during scroll-behind). (2) Hidden dev mode-toggle label 'Ref' -> 'Crash Cart' (L12685, #mode-ref) for label consistency with the nav - note this #mode-toggle strip is display:none (flag-gated dev/desktop toggle, invisible to field), so zero user-facing impact, pure consistency. RECON RESULT (why the 'Ref->Crash Cart rename' is otherwise DONE): the field-visible nav label + aria are ALREADY 'Crash Cart' (L15212); the only other 'Ref' text was this hidden toggle. DELIBERATELY NOT DONE: (a) the internal state-key rename (showMode('ref'), #pg-ref x12, id=bn-ref/mode-ref) - a routing refactor with real blast radius + hard-rule-adjacent (no legacy page-ids in nav state), ZERO user value since ids are invisible; recommend against. (b) stripping the 'IOU notes' (L12812-14 rf-hw/rf-cli/rf-hwref 're-homing ... in a later step') - these are HONEST visible placeholders for the owner-gated Stage 5-6 re-home; a bare strip leaves blank panels (silent-empty), so it needs an owner call (do the re-home / hide the sub-tabs / leave). Text+CSS only, no JS/data/braces. Three-stamp .296->.297; braces 11737/11737 unchanged; CRLF preserved. DEVICE-VERIFY: nav bottom bar reads fully solid (no content ghosting through as you scroll a long Crash Cart / Work list under it). Rides the pending .286->.297 batch sweep. Remaining cheap fixes + the big N-09..N-18 backlog still await owner sequencing.
